title: Altar Arc 2
description: A replica of the popular smp: altar smp arc 2.
body:
This plugin is a replica of the Altar SMP Arc 2 plugin. This plugin lets you recreate what you see on the proper SMP.

# Setting It Up:

All you need to do is put the .jar file in the plugins folder of your server you also need [Altar Arc 1](https://modrinth.com/plugin/altar-smp-arc-1-plugin) installed on your server as well.

## Usage:

/contagioncatalystitem - Gives you the contagion catlayst
/resetcontagionritual - Resets the contagion ritual allowing it to be started again and allowing people to be different species
/hyperion - Gives you hyperion
/hyperionaltar - Spawns the hyperion altar
/hyperionshard - Gives you a hyperion shard
/hyperionshardaltar - Spawns a hyperion shard altar
/nightpiercer - Gives you nightpiercer
/paleshard - Gives you a pale shard
/nightpierceraltar - Spawns the nightpiercer altar
/nightpiercershard - Gives you a nightpiercer shard
/nightpiercershardaltar - Spawns the nightpiercer shard altar
/crazyslots - Gives you crazy slots
/crazyslotsaltar - Spawns the crazy slots altar
/palecannonaltar - Spawns the pale rot altar
/makeallhuman - Makes all online players human
/makeallpalerots - Makes all online players pale rots
/makeallvampires - Makes all online players vampires
/specfichuman <player> - Makes a specfic player human 
/specficvampire <player> - Makes a specfic player vampire
/specifcpale <player> - Makes a specfic player pale rot
/plaguedoctor <player> - Makes that player the plague doctor

The plugin is highly configurable via the config file:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c9421d6605a668d4b40d4213910d700b6cc89dc.png)

If a vampire kills a non-vampire the non-vampire becoms a vampire.
If a player dies with pale rot they become a pale rot.
You get pale rot by standing on moss.
If a human uses hyperion to kill a non-human the non-human becomes human.
The contagion ritual converts all players to the species of the person who started the ritual.
To start the ritual place the Contagion Catlayst on an altar.
You get permanent speed 1, fire resistance and strength 1 whilst you are a vampire at night.
If you craft crazy slots you become the first vampire. Pale rots do double backstab damage.

Get the texture pack on my discord.

Planned updates include adding the blood moon and adding a crafting recipe for the contagion catalyst.
